name: mern-ts-template
description: MERN Stack TypeScript Template with Auth0

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix Server && npm install --prefix Client
scripts.dev: node scripts/check-docker.js && docker-compose up --build server client
scripts.reset:mongodb: docker-compose down && docker volume rm mern-ts-tempalte-2_mongodb_data 2>/dev/null || docker volume rm mern-mongodb_data 2>/dev/null || echo 'Volume not found or already removed'
